title: Consumer Outlook: Guide to 2026 - NIQ
snippet: Our survey revealed that global respondents say their lifestyles and priorities have shifted after the events of the last few years, and their mindsets are focused on spending more time at home/going out less (40%) and taking proactive measures to prevent health issues (38%). title: NIQ: How APAC Consumers Will Shop in 2026
snippet:
### About Consumer Outlook: Guide to 2026

NIQ’s Consumer Outlook: Guide to 2026 provides an analytic assessment of the state of consumers, based on a global footprint of consumer intelligence solutions and the feedback of nearly 19,000 consumers in 27 countries including Australia, China, India, Indonesia, Japan, Korea, Singapore, and Thailand.
